subcodes.title: Words spoken at Grand Hotel in Vienna, 1913-04-23
subcodes.first_line: We came to Europe and found that some Persians -- individuals of no significance who are entirely unconcerned with religion
subcodes.first_line_orig: باروپا آمدیم دیدیم بعضی از اهل ایران یعنی چند نفر غیر مهم که ابداً در بند دیانت
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @past, present and future of Iran, @unity; oneness of humanity
